title: Etsy Forward Guidance 2026: Return to Growth Expected
text: Etsy provided forward guidance for 2026 that signals a return to growth trajectory after two years of GMS challenges. For full-year 2026, the company expects low single-digit GMS growth for the core Etsy marketplace, with positive year-over-year comparisons in each quarter. Adjusted EBITDA margin is expected to remain strong at 28% to 30%, demonstrating the company's ability to drive profitability improvements through operational leverage and high-margin services growth. Q2 2026 guidance calls for marketplace GMS of $2.48 billion to $2.53 billion, representing 3% to 5% year-over-year growth. The company expects a take rate of approximately 25.7% and adjusted EBITDA margin of 27% to 29% for Q2. This guidance reflects the successful execution of AI-driven growth initiatives, improved buyer engagement from personalization investments, and strong mobile app momentum. Management expressed confidence in the core marketplace's ability to deliver sustainable growth through continued investment in search, discovery, and personalization capabilities. The planned divestitures of Depop and earlier sale of Reverb will further improve consolidated profitability metrics.
